about.name: Arun Kumar
description: I specialize in frontend engineering with Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS, and I commonly use shadcn/ui to build clean, accessible interfaces.
On the backend, I work with Node.js, Express, and Go, and I typically use PostgreSQL and MongoDB for production-ready applications.

I have a strong foundation in machine learning and deep learning, with hands-on experience implementing research papers in computer vision, including object detection, image super-resolution, and Attention Is All You Need.
I am deeply interested in practical AI and enjoy building personal projects that turn emerging ideas into useful products.
